def find_common_users(active_users, banned_users):
    banned_set = set(banned_users)
    common = []
    for user in active_users:
        if user in banned_set:
            common.append(user)
    return common


def filter_allowed_items(items, allowed_ids):
    allowed_set = set(allowed_ids)
    result = []
    for item in items:
        if item.id in allowed_set:
            result.append(item)
    return result


def check_duplicates(entries, existing_entries):
    existing_set = set(existing_entries)
    duplicates = []
    for entry in entries:
        if entry in existing_set:
            duplicates.append(entry)
    return duplicates
